title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.489 - U.S. Army PFC Adam L Thomas Memorial Bridge designated for a bridge on U.S. Highway 63 in Macon County
text:
227.489.  U.S. Army PFC Adam L Thomas Memorial Bridge designated for a bridge on U.S. Highway 63 in Macon County. — The bridge on U.S. Highway 63 crossing over the BSNF Railroad/Marceline Sub in La Plata in Macon County shall be designated as the "U.S. Army PFC Adam L Thomas Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs to be paid for by private donations.
(L. 2021 S.B. 258)
